LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER EVANS BROTHERS, INC.'S MOTION ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- DENY, FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN - SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE STANDARD APPLIES. 1) SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SHOWS DBE GOOD FAITH REQUIREMENT IS MET. 2) CONTRACT DOESN'T REQUIRE SSPC CERTIFICATE. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
*No appearance, the Court adopts its tentative ruling -- PETITIONER EVANS BROTHERS, INC.'S MOTION On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate -- Deny, failure to sustain burden - Substantial Evidence Standard applies. 1) Substantial evidence shows DBE good faith requirement is met. 2) Contract doesn't require SSPC Certificate. CSR Beldon Yee, #2647 (REQ/302/PB)
